test.command: go list ./internal/... | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/cogent/internal/adapters/codex' | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/cogent/internal/mcpserver' | xargs env GOMAXPROCS=4 go test

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed copy-paste error in .factory/library/architecture.md: 'cogent (formerly cogent)' → 'cogent (formerly fase)'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: Environment variables should follow the pattern COGENT_* (e.g., COGENT_STATE_DIR, COGENT_CONFIG_DIR, COGENT_CACHE_DIR, COGENT_EXECUTABLE) to match the binary name convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature rename-binary-cli-statedir initially left environment variables as FASE_*, which were later corrected in rename-docs-and-final-sweep (commit a5ba451). The naming convention was not documented, leading to this cross-feature gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: When documenting historical renames, use 'X (formerly Y)' or 'Y → X' notation. Always verify the old name appears before the new name to avoid copy-paste errors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature rename-docs-and-final-sweep added .factory/library/architecture.md with errors like 'cogent (formerly cogent)' and '.cogent/ → .cogent/' instead of showing the actual transition from fase to cogent. This pattern appeared in multiple locations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify policy: Should migration logic (e.g., auto-renaming .fase/ to .cogent/) be permanent or temporary? Feature rename-binary-cli-statedir implemented migration in commit 90ea93d, but it was removed in commit a5ba451, creating a gap where users upgrading after the final sweep won't have automatic migration.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Migration code added in 90ea93d and removed in a5ba451. Handoff for a5ba451 mentions 'simplified stale repo-state path tests' but doesn't explain the migration removal decision. This affects user experience for external users upgrading from fase to cogent.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether .factory/missions/ directory files should be committed to the repository or remain ephemeral. Currently cogent-simplification.md is committed but contains pre-rename context that's confusing post-rename.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: File .factory/missions/cogent-simplification.md was committed in a5ba451 with pre-rename notation. When read after the rename is complete, the historical context can be confusing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add step: For rename operations, after completing documentation updates, review all 'formerly X' and 'X → Y' notations to verify old names appear before new names. This catches copy-paste errors where the same name appears on both sides.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature rename-docs-and-final-sweep added comprehensive documentation but contained multiple instances of copy-paste errors in rename notation. The go-worker skill doesn't include documentation quality checks specific to rename operations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance for gh CLI operations (GitHub repository management) as these differ from code changes. Current skill treats them as manual verification which works but isn't optimized.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature rename-github-repo successfully used gh CLI operations via manual verification steps. The go-worker skill doesn't have specific patterns for GitHub operations, though the general procedure was sufficient.
